name: Vichyssoise
recipeInstructions:
Use 2 large leeks. Slice yellow onions to make 3 cups if needed.
May use 6 tbsp instant chicken bouillon dissolved in 6 cups hot water.
Simmer the vegetables in the chicken stock until tender (about 45 minutes).
Blend the cooked vegetables and liquid to a smooth soup using an electric blender.
Stir whipping cream into the soup. Chill. Serve in chilled bowls, and decorate with minced chives.
This keeps well and can be thinned to the desired consistency with cold milk.
Serves 6-8
Source: "Mountain Measures" -- Junior League of Charleston, WV
Edited by 1974
